calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, JULY-30-2014: PLAINTIFF MR. ADIL SHAIKH APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE(S) BY OR FOR DEFENDANTS JOSEPH CERVETTO AND/OR MONIQUE FERRARI THIS DAY. THE PLAINTIFF SUBMITS PROVE-UP DOCUMENTS TO THE COURT AND MAKES STATEMENTS TO THE COURT REGARDING THE CAUSE. THE COURT READS AND REVIEWS THE DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED AND CONSIDERS PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE. THEREUPON, THE COURT SIGNS THE JUDGMENT--UNLAWFUL DETAINER BY DEFAULT, WHICH IS FILED AND ENTERED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

JUDGE: HON. RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 624).

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Guy Stilson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Adil Shaikh is present.
Defendant Dexter Young is present. Defendant left without being excused by the JPT.
Defendant Monique Ferrari DID NOT APPEAR at 1:30pm. Defendant came in at 3:20pm.
Attorney Audrey Siegel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUL-14-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
